otherRequirements: Visa-free entry for tourism for up to 90 days
Complete the Malaysia Digital Arrival Card (MDAC) within 3 days before arrival
Passport must be valid for at least 6 months from your date of arrival
sourceNote: gov.uk Malaysia travel advice — visa-free visits for tourism up to 90 days (https://www.gov.uk/foreign-travel-advice/malaysia/entry-requirements)
